---
title: "Intro to data wrangling and visualization with the tidyverse"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

> Practice the single-table dplyr verbs and the fundamentals of plotting with ggplot2.

## Slides
[Make slides full screen](slides.qmd)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

Before we touch the tools, think about the visualizations themselves.

{{< include exercise_0_dataviz.qmd >}}

{{< include exercise_1.qmd >}}

{{< include exercise_2.qmd >}}
